acceptance_targets: [ch07-F005] PASS if the exact construction 'hard enough to' appears no more than twice across the revised target lines and remaining instances are not clustered in consecutive scenes; FAIL if three or more instances remain.

[ch07-F006] PASS if the revised memory cluster at line 355 uses at least two different syntactic openings and the chapter contains no more than two total sentences beginning with 'She heard'; FAIL if the three-beat anaphora remains intact.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the exact construction 'hard enough to' appears no more than twice across the revised target lines and remaining instances are not clustered in consecutive scenes; FAIL if three or more instances remain.
findings.evidence: The same sentence construction recurs four times: 'hard enough to ...' at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:3, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:107, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:119, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:311.
findings.problem: Recurring formula exceeds stylistic tolerance and reads as autopilot emphasis, flattening prose texture.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise at least two of the four target lines (snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:3, 107, 119, 311) with different intensification structures and sensory framing so emphasis does not rely on the same template.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised memory cluster at line 355 uses at least two different syntactic openings and the chapter contains no more than two total sentences beginning with 'She heard'; FAIL if the three-beat anaphora remains intact.
findings.evidence: Interiority repetition: 'She heard ...' appears at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:121 and three times in succession at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:355.
findings.problem: The repeated interior lead-in becomes a rhetorical tic at a pivotal emotional beat, reducing tonal precision.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:355 (and, if needed, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:121) so interiority arrives through varied sentence starts (memory image, bodily sensation, judgment) rather than repeated 'She heard' scaffolding.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
